Description:
Immediately remove and destroy all copies of the revision of
                the product that has been revised or recalled.

Retain the existing copies of the revision of the product
                but indicate that it is not the latest revision.

Retain the existing copies of the revision of the product
                but prevent access and distribution.

The action to be taken as a result of the
                revision or recall requires manual intervention by a human to read and follow the
                included instructions.
